paragraph1: Welcome. I'm Jose F. Brevil, Jr., a graduate of the Mississippi School for Mathematics and Science and an undergraduate student at the University of Mississippi pursuing a B.S. in Economics and a B.A. in Public Policy Leadership, with a minor in Intelligence and Security Studies. My academic interests lie at the intersection of law, public policy, and national security, with a particular focus on international law and national security law.
paragraph2: I am especially interested in how legal institutions shape public policy, economic development, and security strategy. Through academic study and public engagement, I seek to understand how legal frameworks can strengthen governance, support effective institutions, and expand access to opportunity.
paragraph3: Outside the classroom, I am involved in several campus organizations and remain committed to continually expanding my knowledge in law, policy, and global affairs. These pursuits guide much of my academic and professional work.
paragraph4: Please feel free to reach out, I always welcome the opportunity to connect!
